Children are weighed to establish their de-worming dosage, Shinile Woreda, Ethiopia, Oct. 13, 2010.

Nursing students from the Arts Medical College of Dire Dawa, Ethiopia, with help from the U.S. Army 418th Civil Function Specialty Team
